tagline: You can now store, govern, and access secrets as securable objects in Unity Catalog.
what_it_does: You can now store, govern, and access secrets as securable objects in Unity Catalog. A Unity Catalog secret uses the three level namespace (catalog.schema.secret) and is governed by Unity Catalog privileges, so you can apply the same access controls and auditing that you use for other data assets. Preview This feature is in Public Preview.
why_it_matters: You can now store, govern, and access secrets as securable objects in Unity Catalog.
